data.body: CLAIM 3b30-2168-ba16-41fc. Test contract card: authoritative_contract=3b30 AC + epic fallback contract; trigger_preconditions=ANALYZERS contains configured fake for happy path or lacks language for miss; production_path=rebar.metrics.analyzer public module using real AnalyzerResult/resolve/analyze_or_unavailable and registry.Unavailable; tier=in-process unit because seam is pure selection/dispatch; observable_postcondition=configured analyzer receives repo_root+languages and result passes through, miss returns exact Unavailable reason plus supplied accruing_since, result unsupported fields remain None; negative_control=configured language must not return Unavailable; collateral_invariant=import/reload does not mutate metrics REGISTRY; ci_gate=make test (focused pytest first).
